name: Kontentino
description:
Kontentino is your new home for creative collaboration. With smart tools for planning, scheduling, and approving content, it's especially popular among agencies and larger teams. Between its streamlined workflow and intuitive interface, it’s a key part of coordinating social media efforts with efficiency and ease.

Here’s what makes it stand out:

  • Pricing starts at $53/month, but you can try it first with a 14-day free trial
  • An intuitive content calendar makes it easy to plan and organize content with your team
  • Don’t get us started on the collaboration tools. Get ready to simplify your approval process and level up team collaboration
  • With a stellar analytics dashboard, you can track the performance of your posts and campaigns with ease
  • Supported platforms include: Facebook, Instagram, X (Twitter), LinkedIn, Pinterest, and Google

Key Features:

✅  Collaborative planning

✅  Content approval workflow

✅  Performance analytics
what_people_say:
What people say :

Kontentino is best for medium to large teams who need help coordinating and collaborating with each other. On the whole, the platform makes it easier than ever to create content quickly and efficiently. Your team will be out of the office for happy hour in no time!

Here’s what customers think:

“Kontentino has streamlined our content planning. We started as a small team, and the price was a stretch. But it helped so much with our content planning, so we stuck with it. One complaint: they seem behind other platforms in terms of incorporating things like AI-based content automation. I’d love to get that going.”

“It’s great for team collaboration. Love, love, love it. If there were more direct audience engagement features it would be perfect.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Social inbox
  • 🚫 Multi-brand management
  • 🚫 Audience engagement features
  • 🚫 Integration with additional digital marketing tools
